title: Craftwerk
description: A more adventurous and wondrous Vanilla Plus experience, featuring new world generation, new structures, quality of life improvements, a visual overhaul, and enhanced performance.
body:
**"Craftwerk"** is an extensive vanilla-plus modpack that enhances and enriches Minecraft in numerous ways, all while maintaining the core feel of the original game and adding almost no new items. The modpack focuses particularly on the following areas:

**•	Performance:** Thanks to a collection of versatile performance mods, the days of low FPS are behind you!

**•	World:** With the "Litosphere" world generation, players will explore breathtaking landscapes, further enriched by new vanilla-like structures, dungeons, and biomes.

**•	Gameplay:** The gameplay is enhanced by a variety of smaller mods that complement the core mechanics without altering them. This includes quality-of-life improvements and mods that expand existing features.

**•	Challenge:** The difficulty is increased through tougher boss fights, stronger enemies, and mods that extend the late-game experience, such as "End Remastered".

**•	Audio-Visual:** With a wide array of audio and visual mods, as well as resource packs, the overall sensory experience is taken to a new level. Along with a revamped GUI, the gameplay itself becomes a fresh and immersive experience.

Used Vanilla Tweaks Ressourcepack: https://vanillatweaks.net/share#7RWM8Y
